items.title: David Fizdale can’t hurt me.
items.author: Sam DiGiovanni
items.body_excerpt:
David Fizdale can’t hurt me.
Scott Perry and Steve Mills can’t hurt me.
TJ McConnell’s game winner can’t hurt me.
Having hopes for Kevin Knox, Dennis Smith Jr and Frank Ntilikina can’t hurt me.
KD and Kyrie signing with the Nets can’t hurt me.

We’re going to the fucking NBA FINALS

items.title: 2025-26 All-NBA teams:
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt:
2025-26 All-NBA teams:

First: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, Nikola Jokic, Victor Wembanyama, Luka Doncic, Cade Cunningham

Second: Jaylen Brown, Kawhi Leonard, Kevin Durant, Jalen Brunson, Donovan Mitchell

Third: Tyrese Maxey, Jamal Murray, Jalen Johnson, Jalen Duren, Chet Holmgren
